scripts.test:build: turbo run build && bun run --cwd Tests build.js
scripts.publish: turbo run build && bun run --cwd Packages/adapter npm publish --access public && bun run --cwd Packages/client npm publish --access public && bun run --cwd Packages/server npm publish --access public && bun run --cwd Packages/swagger npm publish --access public && bun run --cwd Packages/validations npm publish --access public && bun run --cwd Packages/types npm publish --access public
